creator: dkelly@nebula.tbe.com
text:
Have no trouble downloading the ftp exmh-2.0.1.tar.Z but can't get
the http:// patches.

Fix: 

Change Makefile:
old:
PATCH_SITES=    http://www.sunlabs.com/~bwelch/exmh/patches/2.0.1/

new:
PATCH_SITES=    http://sunscript.sun.com/exmh/patches/2.0.1/

and while we're in there, there are a number of new patches.
How-To-Repeat: 
# cd /usr/ports/mail/exmh2
# make fetch
